name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-openspec-workflow
description: OpenSpec-lifecycle helper skills for pi sessions — spec-coherence-check (sweep active proposals for staleness/conflicts/obsolescence), pre-scaffold-openspec-coherence-check (guard before scaffolding a proposal against archived/shipped work), fix-worktree-opsx-skills-not-created (repair worktrees missing the generated opsx skills), reverse-spec-from-code (backfill capability specs from spec-less code). Pure-skill package, no extension.ts. Reusable in any OpenSpec + pi project.
